---
title: "Study sites"
subtitle: "Locations of all tracking studies"
date: today
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<!-- Leaflet + MarkerCluster from CDN -->
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/leaflet.markercluster@1.5.3/dist/MarkerCluster.css" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/leaflet.markercluster@1.5.3/dist/MarkerCluster.Default.css" />
<script src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js"></script>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet.markercluster@1.5.3/dist/leaflet.markercluster.js"></script>

<style>
  #gb-controls { display:flex; gap:0.75rem; align-items:center; flex-wrap:wrap; margin:0.5rem 0 0.75rem 0; font-size:0.92rem; }
  #gb-controls input, #gb-controls select { padding:0.3rem 0.5rem; border:1px solid #ccc; border-radius:4px; }
  #gb-controls .meta { color:#6c7a76; }
  #gb-map { height: 78vh; width: 100%; border:1px solid #e2e2e2; border-radius:6px; }
  .leaflet-popup-content { font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1.35; }
  .leaflet-popup-content b { color:#2c5f4f; }
</style>

<div id="gb-controls">
  <label>Species: <select id="gb-species"><option value="">All</option></select></label>
  <label>Search: <input id="gb-search" type="text" placeholder="study or country" /></label>
  <span class="meta" id="gb-count"></span>
</div>
<div id="gb-map"></div>

<script>
(function() {
  const map = L.map('gb-map', { worldCopyJump: true }).setView([20, 10], 2);

  // Two basemaps the user can toggle
  const osm = L.tileLayer('https://{s}.tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png', {
    maxZoom: 18, attribution: '© OpenStreetMap contributors'
  }).addTo(map);
  const esriTopo = L.tileLayer(
    'https://server.arcgisonline.com/ArcGIS/rest/services/World_Topo_Map/MapServer/tile/{z}/{y}/{x}',
    { maxZoom: 18, attribution: 'Tiles © Esri' }
  );
  const esriImg = L.tileLayer(
    'https://server.arcgisonline.com/ArcGIS/rest/services/World_Imagery/MapServer/tile/{z}/{y}/{x}',
    { maxZoom: 19, attribution: 'Tiles © Esri' }
  );
  L.control.layers(
    { 'OpenStreetMap': osm, 'Esri Topographic': esriTopo, 'Esri Imagery': esriImg },
    null, { position: 'topright', collapsed: true }
  ).addTo(map);

  const cluster = L.markerClusterGroup({
    showCoverageOnHover: false,
    spiderfyOnMaxZoom: true,
    maxClusterRadius: 45
  });

  let allFeatures = [];
  let currentSpecies = '';
  let currentSearch  = '';

  function fmtNum(v) {
    return (v == null || isNaN(v)) ? '—' : Number(v).toLocaleString();
  }

  // Convert "M/D/YY" or "M/D/YYYY" → ISO "YYYY-MM-DD" (unambiguous, sortable)
  function fmtDate(s) {
    if (s == null || s === '') return '—';
    const m = String(s).match(/^(\d{1,2})\/(\d{1,2})\/(\d{2,4})$/);
    if (!m) return String(s);
    let [, mm, dd, yy] = m;
    if (yy.length === 2) yy = (Number(yy) > 50 ? '19' : '20') + yy;
    return `${yy}-${mm.padStart(2,'0')}-${dd.padStart(2,'0')}`;
  }

  function popupHtml(p) {
    return `
      <b>${p.study ?? 'unknown'}</b><br/>
      <i>${p.species ?? ''}</i><br/>
      Individuals: ${fmtNum(p.n_ind)} · Fixes: ${fmtNum(p.n_pts)}<br/>
      Period: ${fmtDate(p.start)} – ${fmtDate(p.end)}<br/>
      Median interval: ${p.interval_min == null ? '—' : p.interval_min + ' min'}<br/>
      Country: ${p.countries ?? '—'} ${p.iso ? '(' + p.iso + ')' : ''}
    `;
  }

  function passesFilter(p) {
    if (currentSpecies && p.species !== currentSpecies) return false;
    if (currentSearch) {
      const q = currentSearch.toLowerCase();
      const hay = [p.study, p.species, p.countries, p.iso].filter(Boolean).join(' ').toLowerCase();
      if (!hay.includes(q)) return false;
    }
    return true;
  }

  function render() {
    cluster.clearLayers();
    let n = 0;
    for (const f of allFeatures) {
      const p = f.properties;
      if (!passesFilter(p)) continue;
      const [lon, lat] = f.geometry.coordinates;
      const m = L.circleMarker([lat, lon], {
        radius: 6, color: '#2c5f4f', weight: 1, fillColor: '#2c5f4f', fillOpacity: 0.6
      }).bindPopup(popupHtml(p));
      cluster.addLayer(m);
      n++;
    }
    map.addLayer(cluster);
    document.getElementById('gb-count').textContent =
      `${n} of ${allFeatures.length} studies shown`;
  }

  // Resolve data path relative to this page so it works in subdirs (project Pages site)
  const dataUrl = new URL('data/studies_metadata.geojson', document.baseURI).href;

  fetch(dataUrl)
    .then(r => {
      if (!r.ok) throw new Error('GeoJSON HTTP ' + r.status);
      return r.json();
    })
    .then(geo => {
      allFeatures = geo.features;

      // Populate species dropdown
      const sel = document.getElementById('gb-species');
      const sp = [...new Set(allFeatures.map(f => f.properties.species).filter(Boolean))].sort();
      for (const s of sp) {
        const opt = document.createElement('option');
        opt.value = s; opt.textContent = s;
        sel.appendChild(opt);
      }
      sel.addEventListener('change', e => { currentSpecies = e.target.value; render(); });
      document.getElementById('gb-search').addEventListener('input', e => {
        currentSearch = e.target.value; render();
      });

      // Fit to data bounds
      const lats = allFeatures.map(f => f.geometry.coordinates[1]);
      const lons = allFeatures.map(f => f.geometry.coordinates[0]);
      map.fitBounds([[Math.min(...lats), Math.min(...lons)],
                     [Math.max(...lats), Math.max(...lons)]], { padding:[20,20] });

      render();
    })
    .catch(err => {
      document.getElementById('gb-map').innerHTML =
        '<div style="padding:1rem;color:#a00">Failed to load GeoJSON: ' + err.message + '</div>';
    });
})();
</script>
```

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true"}
## How this map is built

Locations are loaded from `data/studies_metadata.geojson`, which is exported from
`map/studies_metadata.gpkg` whenever the studies database is updated. To regenerate:

```bash
# requires GDAL
ogr2ogr -f GeoJSON site/data/studies_metadata.geojson \
  "map/studies_metadata.gpkg" studies_metadata_sf
```

Or in R:

```r
sf::st_read("map/studies_metadata.gpkg") |>
  sf::st_write("site/data/studies_metadata.geojson", delete_dsn = TRUE)
```
:::
